sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109673" key="u(rgai/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑργαί</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">αἱ</gen>, <sense id="n109673.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐπιθέματα πρὸς κουφισμὸν τῶν φορτίων</ref></xr>, ibid.; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὑρχή.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
